interaction_phrase: Danish physicist Niels Bohr
occurrence_sentence: Reality may seem wonderful and mysterious when you think about the insight for which the Danish physicist Niels Bohr received the Nobel Prize in 1922.

interaction_phrase: Niels Bohr's pioneering research
occurrence_sentence: Since Niels Bohr's pioneering research, which laid the foundation for our understanding of quantum mechanics, some very strong research environments within quantum have been established in Denmark.

interaction_phrase: at the Technical University of Denmark (DTU)
occurrence_sentence: Most of the Danish quantum research is currently taking place at the University of Copenhagen (KU), the Technical University of Denmark (DTU) and Aarhus University (AU), but activities are also emerging at the University of Southern Denmark (SDU) and Aalborg University (AAU).

interaction_phrase: at the University of Copenhagen (KU)
occurrence_sentence: Most of the Danish quantum research is currently taking place at the University of Copenhagen (KU), the Technical University of Denmark (DTU) and Aarhus University (AU), but activities are also emerging at the University of Southern Denmark (SDU) and Aalborg University (AAU).

interaction_phrase: main contributors have been the Danish National Research Foundation
occurrence_sentence: The main contributors have been the Danish National Research Foundation, the Innovation Fund Denmark, the Villum Foundation, the Carlsberg Foundation and, increasingly, the Novo Nordisk Foundation.

interaction_phrase: main contributors have been the Innovation Fund Denmark
occurrence_sentence: The main contributors have been the Danish National Research Foundation, the Innovation Fund Denmark, the Villum Foundation, the Carlsberg Foundation and, increasingly, the Novo Nordisk Foundation.

interaction_phrase: EU Framework Program for Research and Innovation is another important source of funding
occurrence_sentence: The EU Framework Program for Research and Innovation is another important source of funding, which has contributed with approx. DKK 0.5 billion in the period 2014-2020.

interaction_phrase: support the security and sovereignty of Denmark and its allies
occurrence_sentence: It is, however, essential that the entire ecosystem functions and is interconnected, including the actors who use and develop quantum technology, provide advice on quantum technology, attract national and international investments and skills, regulate the framework conditions and support the security and sovereignty of Denmark and its allies.

occurrence_sentence: In the agreement on the distribution of the research reserve for 2023, the government and the parties to the agreement have allocated DKK 150 million for the initiation of the strategic quantum program.

interaction_phrase: Danish participation in EU cooperations
occurrence_sentence: The strategic quantum program is to support Danish participation in EU cooperations and in global research and innovation cooperations with like-minded countries along the entire food chain.

interaction_phrase: bilateral/multilateral calls for proposals, e.g. under EUREKA
occurrence_sentence: This may, for example, be EU partnerships that require co-financing or bilateral/multilateral calls for proposals, e.g. under EUREKA.

interaction_phrase: inside and outside the EU
occurrence_sentence: In order to find the best collaborations inside and outside the EU, it is therefore necessary for the Danish research environment to have an international scope.

interaction_phrase: securing grants for just over DKK 0.5 billion for quantum research
occurrence_sentence: The EU's framework programs for research and innovation have played a major role in Danish quantum research by securing grants for just over DKK 0.5 billion for quantum research during the period 2014-2020.

interaction_phrase: leading participants in quantum projects under Horizon Europe
occurrence_sentence: The government will work to ensure that Danish quantum researchers are leading participants in quantum projects under Horizon Europe (2021-2027).

interaction_phrase: support Danish participation in the EU partnerships under Horizon Europe
occurrence_sentence: The strategic quantum program, cf. Initiative 1, must therefore support Danish participation in the EU partnerships under Horizon Europe, and this requires national co-financing.

interaction_phrase: restricted participation from third countries in research projects regarding e.g. the quantum area
occurrence_sentence: The European Commission has also restricted participation from third countries in research projects regarding e.g. the quantum area and has, generally, sharpened its focus on European strategic autonomy when we cooperate with third countries.

interaction_phrase: build on the good cooperation that already exists among the Nordic countries
occurrence_sentence: Denmark has several obvious cooperation partners within the EU. occurrence_sentence: The project will contribute to the development of quantum communication and give public authorities and universities specific experience with using quantum technology.

occurrence_sentence: The next phase will build on this experience and initiate the first rollout of an ultra-secure communications network in Denmark and the EU.

interaction_phrase: promoting relevant calls for proposals in work programs under Horizon Europe
occurrence_sentence: This could be by promoting relevant calls for proposals in work programs under Horizon Europe and by increasing consulting to contribute to the creation of networks and partnerships as well as processes for submitting applications within the quantum field.

occurrence_sentence: Invest in Denmark – part of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Denmark – works to attract innovative quantum companies that can strengthen cooperation or establish specific research cooperations with Danish universities.

occurrence_sentence: In an initiative between the EU and ESA, we see e.g. new types of sensors based on quantum technology as a promising method for optimizing gravity measurements, which is also used for direct measurement of global sea level rise, melting of the earth's ice caps and the cycle of droughts and floods.

interaction_phrase: a broad majority in the Danish Parliament have launched a national skills-building effort
occurrence_sentence: With the political agreement on the distribution of the research reserve for 2023, the government and a broad majority in the Danish Parliament have launched a national skills-building effort through DeiC in order to support Denmark fully using access to quantum computers and supercomputers (HPC facilities) for the benefit of Danish research and innovation in the quantum field.

interaction_phrase: through DeiC
occurrence_sentence: With the political agreement on the distribution of the research reserve for 2023, the government and a broad majority in the Danish Parliament have launched a national skills-building effort through DeiC in order to support Denmark fully using access to quantum computers and supercomputers (HPC facilities) for the benefit of Danish research and innovation in the quantum field.

occurrence_sentence: The EU cooperation in the area of supercomputers (EuroHPC) offers a framework for both researchers and companies to build skills.

interaction_phrase: under the Danish e-Infrastructure Cooperation (DeiC)
occurrence_sentence: The government will, under the Danish e-Infrastructure Cooperation (DeiC) implement an intensified effort to give Danish researchers and students user access to as many test and technology platforms for a quantum computer as possible.

interaction_phrase: allocated DKK 50 million to this in 2023 via the political agreement on the distribution of the research reserve for 2023
occurrence_sentence: Initially, the government and a broad majority in the Danish Parliament have allocated DKK 50 million to this in 2023 via the political agreement on the distribution of the research reserve for 2023.

interaction_phrase: lead a group of international partners
occurrence_sentence: In the long term, the government's ambition is for Denmark to lead a group of international partners to establish and operate a quantum computer as an accelerator component for supercomputer facilities in Denmark.

interaction_phrase: attract a European Quantum Excellence Center
occurrence_sentence: With the political agreement on the distribution of the research reserve for 2023, the government and a broad majority in the Danish parliament have started a project under the Danish e-Infrastructure Cooperation (DeiC) to attract a European Quantum Excellence Center for quantum software and algorithms.

interaction_phrase: lead a European collaboration
occurrence_sentence: The aim is for Denmark to lead a European collaboration with a view to carrying out research in and development of quantum software and quantum algorithms at a high international level.

occurrence_sentence: The geopolitical situation with the war in Ukraine, increased rivalry between the US and China, and the technological race places new demands on a small, open economy like Denmark and emphasize that business and trade policy has increasingly become a matter of security policy.

occurrence_sentence: As part of a research project financed by the Novo Nordisk Foundation, an IBM Quantum Hub is being established at the University of Copenhagen, so that selected researchers, including from businesses, can learn how to program a quantum computer.

interaction_phrase: at the University of Copenhagen
occurrence_sentence: The laboratory will be at the forefront of developing the world's first scalable quantum computer.

interaction_phrase: the quantum agenda is receiving increased attention in the EU
occurrence_sentence: This applies in particular to the US and China, but several European countries are also making large investments in quantum technology, and the quantum agenda is receiving increased attention in the EU and NATO.

interaction_phrase: our partners and allies about Denmark's commitment
occurrence_sentence: Thus, a national strategy sends a strong signal to our partners and allies about Denmark's commitment.

interaction_phrase: our collaboration partners
occurrence_sentence: A stronger commitment must further expand the Danish quantum ecosystem and strengthen international relations – also to the benefit of our collaboration partners and our technological sovereignty.

interaction_phrase: international partnerships
occurrence_sentence: A central part of this task is to ensure that the development takes into account the safety and protection of Danish quantum technology, just as international partnerships must contribute to creating the best possible framework conditions for the development of Danish quantum technology.

occurrence_sentence: The effort will encompass various supporting activities established through a close and dedicated partnership with researchers, quantum start-ups, pertinent businesses, and participants within the quantum ecosystem, including the Danish Quantum Community (DQC).

occurrence_sentence: The effort will encompass various supporting activities established through a close and dedicated partnership with researchers, quantum start-ups, pertinent businesses, and participants within the quantum ecosystem, including the Danish Quantum Community (DQC).

occurrence_sentence: The quantum sector must be supported by broad cooperation between key stakeholders in order to promote a broadly based national approach through the National Forum for Quantum Technology, which is an initiative under Part 1 of the strategy.

interaction_phrase: proactive support
occurrence_sentence: This means that PET will provide more proactive support to the Danish quantum companies and research institutions with the aim of strengthening their ability to be ensure a proper level of security as new quantum technologies are developed.

occurrence_sentence: a consequently strengthened guidance effort towards companies and research institutions.

interaction_phrase: International cooperation in the EU
occurrence_sentence: International cooperation in the EU and with like-minded countries and allies will be decisive for the commercialisation of quantum technology in Denmark.

interaction_phrase: European quantum technology infrastructure
occurrence_sentence: This should give Denmark a central position in the global value chains and in the European quantum technology infrastructure.

interaction_phrase: in the EU, where the European rules are established
occurrence_sentence: Denmark must engage actively on the international stage. This applies particularly in the EU, where the European rules are established and from which global norms and standards are shaped.

interaction_phrase: Europe's technological sovereignty
occurrence_sentence: The Danish quantum ecosystem must become a central part of Europe's technological sovereignty.

interaction_phrase: Standing on the shoulders of Niels Bohr's pioneering research
occurrence_sentence: Denmark is in a unique position when it comes to taking on that task. Standing on the shoulders of Niels Bohr's pioneering research and a contemporary research environment internationally.

interaction_phrase: increased cooperation must support knowledge sharing and the scaling of quantum products and services to a level where we in Europe can compete internationally
occurrence_sentence: Denmark cannot fully realize the potential of quantum technology without close and committed cooperation with our neighboring European countries. Increased cooperation must support knowledge sharing and the scaling of quantum products and services to a level where we in Europe can compete internationally and thus exert influence on the global development of the technology.

interaction_phrase: the EU's strategic approach and level of ambition will play a decisive role in the years ahead
occurrence_sentence: This calls for solutions across borders in Europe, and thus the EU's strategic approach and level of ambition will play a decisive role in the years ahead.

interaction_phrase: strengthen Denmark's strategic quantum cooperation ... in the EU
occurrence_sentence: The hub will strengthen Denmark's strategic quantum cooperation bilaterally, multilaterally and regionally in the EU and the Nordic region, and with central research institutions and companies in the field of quantum technology.

interaction_phrase: strengthen Denmark's commitment to EU initiatives within the development, commercialisation, and application of quantum technology
occurrence_sentence: By virtue of its strong position in quantum research, Denmark has the opportunity to take a leading role in the EU cooperation. In turn, a targeted effort is being launched to strengthen Denmark's commitment to EU initiatives within the development, commercialisation, and application of quantum technology.

interaction_phrase: Denmark must take advantage of its strongholds to set the tone when it comes to international cooperation on security policy perspectives on quantum technology, including in the EU
occurrence_sentence: In relation to this, Denmark must take advantage of its strongholds to set the tone when it comes to international cooperation on security policy perspectives on quantum technology, including in the EU and NATO cooperation.

interaction_phrase: the bilateral quantum declaration between the USA and Denmark from 2022
occurrence_sentence: The bilateral quantum declaration between the USA and Denmark from 2022 is an example of this, just as cooperation on quantum technology is an important element in the declaration on cooperation between Denmark and Great Britain from 2023.
